---
title: "Publications"
---

## Publications

**UPI-TRM: Policy Improvement under Truncated Evaluators with Verifier-Style Rewards**
Bahram Behzadian et al.
*ICLR 2026 RSI Workshop · NeurIPS 2026 (under review)*
[[PDF]](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=rIzREKws05)

**Fast Algorithms for L∞-Constrained S-Rectangular Robust MDPs**
Bahram Behzadian, Marek Petrik, Chin Pang Ho
*Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)*, 2021
[[PDF]](files/NIPS_2021.pdf)

**Optimizing Percentile Criterion using Robust MDPs**
Bahram Behzadian, Reazul Hasan Russel, Marek Petrik, Chin Pang Ho
*International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS)*, 2021
[[PDF]](files/AISTATS_2021.pdf)

**Fast Feature Selection for Linear Value Function Approximation**
Bahram Behzadian, Soheil Gharatappeh, Marek Petrik
*International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS)*, 2019
[[PDF]](files/ICAPS_2019.pdf)

**Feature Selection by Singular Value Decomposition for Reinforcement Learning**
Bahram Behzadian, Marek Petrik
*Prediction and Generative Modeling Workshop at IJCAI/ICML*, 2018
[[PDF]](files/FAIM_2018.pdf)

**Low-rank Feature Selection for Reinforcement Learning**
Bahram Behzadian, Marek Petrik
*International Symposium on Artificial Intelligence and Mathematics (ISAIM)*, 2018
[[PDF]](files/ISAIM_2018.pdf)

**Robot Navigation in Hand-Drawn Sketched Maps**
Federico Boniardi, Bahram Behzadian, Wolfram Burgard, Gian Diego Tipaldi
*European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR)*, 2015
[[PDF]](files/ECMR_2015.pdf)

**Monte Carlo Localization in Hand-Drawn Maps**
Bahram Behzadian, Pratik Agarwal, Wolfram Burgard, Gian Diego Tipaldi
*International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)*, 2015
[[PDF]](files/IROS_2015.pdf)
